creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Thu Jan  3 15:46:33 2013
New Revision: 309892
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/309892

Log:
  - update to 0.4.10
  - make it PREFIX-safe
  
  PR:		174832
  Submitted by:	olivier@cochard.me

Modified:
  head/x11-fm/deforaos-browser/Makefile
  head/x11-fm/deforaos-browser/distinfo
  head/x11-fm/deforaos-browser/pkg-plist

Modified: head/x11-fm/deforaos-browser/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-fm/deforaos-browser/Makefile	Thu Jan  3 15:44:56 2013	(r309891)
+++ head/x11-fm/deforaos-browser/Makefile	Thu Jan  3 15:46:33 2013	(r309892)
@@ -2,9 +2,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	deforaos-browser
-PORTVERSION=	0.4.8
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.10
 CATEGORIES=	x11-fm
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.defora.org/os/download/download/3701/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.defora.org/os/download/download/4010/
 DISTNAME=	Browser-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	olivier@cochard.me
@@ -22,6 +22,7 @@ USE_GNOME=	gtk20 desktopfileutils
 USE_PKGCONFIG=	build
 USE_GETTEXT=	yes
 INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
+MAKE_ARGS+=	PREFIX=${PREFIX}
 
 MAKE_ENV+=	MANDIR=${MANPREFIX}/man

--- head/x11-fm/deforaos-browser/distinfo	Thu Jan  3 15:44:56 2013	(r309891)

-SIZE (Browser-0.4.8.tar.gz) = 120154
+SHA256 (Browser-0.4.10.tar.gz) = e1883e60781bf8a81ad2c38736ccb14e94ba2467b3a14f49e306dc2ea1444cf7
+SIZE (Browser-0.4.10.tar.gz) = 124966

 bin/view
 include/Desktop/Browser.h
 include/Desktop/Browser/desktop.h

 lib/Browser/plugins/cvs.so
